title: Tick Control in Harlem, Manhattan | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Harlem, Manhattan. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Harlem's beautiful parks, tree-lined streets, and historic brownstones create an inviting environment for residents—but unfortunately, ticks thrive here too. Whether you're enjoying Morningside Park, Marcus Garvey Park, or your own backyard, protecting your family and pets from tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease is essential. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Harlem, from Sugar Hill to East Harlem.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians understand Harlem's unique landscape and treat both residential and commercial properties with safe, EPA-approved products. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee that has made us Harlem's trusted tick control experts.
localContext: Harlem's mix of historic brownstones, modern apartments, community gardens, and green spaces like St. Nicholas Park and Riverbank State Park creates prime tick habitats, especially during warm months. Our team is familiar with treating Harlem's diverse property types, from ground-floor garden apartments on Convent Avenue to multi-family buildings near the Apollo Theater.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Harlem range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Harlem from April through October, with peak activity in May through August. However, mild winters can keep ticks active year-round, making preventative treatments important even in cooler months.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and until treated areas are dry, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: How often should I treat my Harlem property for ticks?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments throughout tick season for optimal protection, especially if you have a yard, garden, or proximity to parks. Properties with heavy wooded areas or known tick problems may benefit from monthly treatments during peak season.
